# Cybercon Solutions

> Managed IT, cybersecurity, cloud, and AI for South Florida businesses. We catch issues early and treat security as the baseline.

Cybercon Solutions LLC serves Cooper City, Davie, and surrounding South Florida. Contact: info@cybercon-solutions.com · (305) 320-5335. Legal mailing address: 407 Lincoln Rd. Suite 6H PMB 7209, Miami Beach, FL 33139. Request any HTML page with `Accept: text/markdown` for a Markdown variant.

## Site

- [Homepage](https://cybercon-solutions.com/): English homepage and free assessment
- [Spanish homepage](https://cybercon-solutions.com/es/): Sitio en español
- [Blog](https://cybercon-solutions.com/blog/): Enterprise AI, IT, and cybersecurity insights
- [Privacy Policy](https://cybercon-solutions.com/privacy/): Privacy and data practices
- [Search](https://cybercon-solutions.com/search/): On-site Pagefind search

## Services

- [Managed IT Services](https://cybercon-solutions.com/services/managed-it/): Help desk, monitoring, and onsite support
- [Cybersecurity & Compliance](https://cybercon-solutions.com/services/cybersecurity/): EDR/XDR, SOC, HIPAA, SOC 2, PCI DSS, GLBA
- [Cloud Services & Architecture](https://cybercon-solutions.com/services/cloud/): Microsoft 365, Google Workspace, Entra ID
- [IT Consulting & Virtual CIO](https://cybercon-solutions.com/services/it-consulting/): Roadmaps, risk, budgets, QBRs
- [Backup & Disaster Recovery](https://cybercon-solutions.com/services/backup-disaster-recovery/): Backups, replication, recovery validation
- [Structured Cabling & Communications](https://cybercon-solutions.com/services/cabling-communications/): Fiber, VoIP, workplace AV
- [AI Consulting & Strategy](https://cybercon-solutions.com/services/ai-consulting/): Practical AI roadmaps and ROI assessment
- [AI Integration & Automation](https://cybercon-solutions.com/services/ai-integration/): Connect AI to ERP, CRM, and existing stack
- [Conversational AI & Voice](https://cybercon-solutions.com/services/conversational-ai/): Chatbots and AI voice systems
- [Web Design & Development](https://cybercon-solutions.com/services/web-design-development/): Accessible sites and custom apps

## Agent discovery

- [Full text map](https://cybercon-solutions.com/llms-full.txt): Longer site summary for AI agents
- [API catalog](https://cybercon-solutions.com/.well-known/api-catalog): Linkset of machine-readable endpoints
- [Auth for agents](https://cybercon-solutions.com/auth.md): OAuth/Auth0 discovery guidance
- [MCP server card](https://cybercon-solutions.com/.well-known/mcp/server-card.json): Model Context Protocol card
- [OpenAPI](https://cybercon-solutions.com/openapi.json): Public HTTP API description
- [Sitemap](https://cybercon-solutions.com/sitemap-index.xml): XML sitemap index

## Optional

- [Spanish privacy](https://cybercon-solutions.com/es/privacy/): Política de privacidad en español
- [Health check](https://cybercon-solutions.com/api/health): Simple API health endpoint
